channel.title: Comments on: Allagash – Interlude 2008, Ep. 68
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Matt
item.dc:creator: Matt
item.description: I had the 2008 back in 2009...and I picked up 2 more bottles this past December. I drank one of them in January and I've been saving the second for my birthday this August when it'll be a full 4 years old. You thought it was delicious in 2009? MMmmmmm....
item.content:encoded: I had the 2008 back in 2009…and I picked up 2 more bottles this past December. I drank one of them in January and I’ve been saving the second for my birthday this August when it’ll be a full 4 years old. You thought it was delicious in 2009? MMmmmmm….

item.title: By: David
item.dc:creator: David
item.description:
Sorry I didn't see these comments earlier ....
Marco ... the 2008 "Best of" episode is here ... http://beeramerica.tv/episode-32-favorite-beers-of-2008/
Frank, yes I have found some beers I don't like. Not many, but some.
item.content:encoded:
Sorry I didn’t see these comments earlier ….

Marco … the 2008 “Best of” episode is here …
http://beeramerica.tv/episode-32-favorite-beers-of-2008/

Frank, yes I have found some beers I don’t like. Not many, but some.

item.title: By: Frank Russo
item.dc:creator: Frank Russo
item.description:
David, I have known you now for over 3 years, question : is there any beer you don't like?
Frank
item.content:encoded:
David, I have known you now for over 3 years, question : is there any beer you don’t like?

Frank

item.title: By: Marco Baio
item.dc:creator: Marco Baio
item.description:
Keep it up guys, look forward to the show every week.
Q. You mention "In 2008 Beer America TV picked 2 Allagash beers as our best of the year, this one makes a strong running for a 2009 pick!" is the 2008 listed on this site? If so, where?
item.content:encoded:
Keep it up guys, look forward to the show every week.

Q. You mention “In 2008 Beer America TV picked 2 Allagash beers as our best of the year, this one makes a strong running for a 2009 pick!” is the 2008 listed on this site? If so, where?
